40. Databricks Agent Framework (Mosaic AI) for DRE 3D
Model Serving Endpoint via Mosaic AI Agent Framework
Model Serving Endpoint via Mosaic AI Agent Framework
WHY Agent Framework for D2/D3 (not just Workflows)?
â€¢ MLflow Tracing gives full span-level visibility into every LLM + tool call
â€¢ Agent Evaluation harness measures groundedness/relevance/correctness per version
â€¢ UC function tools give governance + lineage on all data access inside agents
â€¢ Model Registry gates deployment â€” bad eval score blocks promotion to prod
â€¢ REST endpoint allows future interactive diagnosis queries from the chatbot
WHY Workflows (not Agent Framework) for D1?
â€¢ D1 is pure rule execution â€” no LLM reasoning needed
â€¢ Scheduled + event triggers suit D1 better than REST endpoint
â€¢ Delta trigger â†’ job â†’ result is simpler and cheaper than agent invocation
